briefdescription.para: The namespace for the XML Catalogs elements.
The specific XML Catalog Processing Instruction name.
XML catalog.
create a new Catalog.

parameterdescription.para: should this create an SGML catalog

simplesect.para: the xmlCatalog or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Load the catalog and build the associated data structures.

detaileddescription.para: This can be either an XML Catalog or an SGML Catalog It will recurse in SGML CATALOG entries. On the other hand XML Catalogs are not handled recursively.

simplesect.para: the catalog parsed or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Load an SGML super catalog.

detaileddescription.para: It won't expand CATALOG or DELEGATE references. This is only needed for manipulating SGML Super Catalogs like adding and removing CATALOG or DELEGATE entries.

simplesect.para: the catalog parsed or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Convert all the SGML catalog entries as XML ones.

simplesect.para: the number of entries converted if successful, -1 otherwise

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlCatalog *catal, const xmlChar *type, const xmlChar *orig, const xmlChar *replace)
memberdef.name: xmlACatalogAdd

briefdescription.para: Add an entry in the catalog, it may overwrite existing but different entries.

parameterdescription.para: the type of record to add to the catalog
the system, public or prefix to match
the replacement value for the match

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, -1 otherwise

briefdescription.para: Remove an entry from the catalog.

simplesect.para: the number of entries removed if successful, -1 otherwise

briefdescription.para: Do a complete resolution lookup of an External Identifier.

simplesect.para: the URI of the resource or NULL if not found, it must be freed by the caller.

briefdescription.para: Try to lookup the catalog resource for a system ID.

simplesect.para: the resource if found or NULL otherwise, the value returned must be freed by the caller.

briefdescription.para: Try to lookup the catalog local reference associated to a public ID in that catalog.

simplesect.para: the local resource if found or NULL otherwise, the value returned must be freed by the caller.

briefdescription.para: Do a complete resolution lookup of an URI.

simplesect.para: the URI of the resource or NULL if not found, it must be freed by the caller.

briefdescription.para: Dump the given catalog to the given file.
Free the memory allocated to a Catalog.
Check is a catalog is empty.

parameterdescription.para: should this create an SGML catalog

simplesect.para: 1 if the catalog is empty, 0 if not, amd -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Load the default system catalog.
Load the catalog and makes its definitions effective for the default external entity loader.

detaileddescription.para: It will recurse in SGML CATALOG entries. this function is not thread safe, catalog initialization should preferably be done once at startup

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success -1 in case of error

briefdescription.para: Load the catalogs and makes their definitions effective for the default external entity loader.

detaileddescription.para: this function is not thread safe, catalog initialization should preferably be done once at startup

parameterdescription.para: a list of directories separated by a colon or a space.

briefdescription.para: Free up all the memory associated with catalogs.
Dump all the global catalog content to the given file.
Dump all the global catalog content as a xmlDoc This function is just for testing/debugging purposes.

simplesect.para: The catalog as xmlDoc or NULL if failed, it must be freed by the caller.

briefdescription.para: Do a complete resolution lookup of an External Identifier.

simplesect.para: the URI of the resource or NULL if not found, it must be freed by the caller.

briefdescription.para: Try to lookup the catalog resource for a system ID.

simplesect.para: the resource if found or NULL otherwise, the value returned must be freed by the caller.

briefdescription.para: Try to lookup the catalog reference associated to a public ID.

simplesect.para: the resource if found or NULL otherwise, the value returned must be freed by the caller.

briefdescription.para: Do a complete resolution lookup of an URI.

simplesect.para: the URI of the resource or NULL if not found, it must be freed by the caller.

briefdescription.para: Add an entry in the catalog, it may overwrite existing but different entries.

detaileddescription.para: If called before any other catalog routine, allows to override the default shared catalog put in place by xmlInitializeCatalog;

parameterdescription.para: the type of record to add to the catalog
the system, public or prefix to match
the replacement value for the match

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, -1 otherwise

briefdescription.para: Remove an entry from the catalog.

simplesect.para: the number of entries removed if successful, -1 otherwise

briefdescription.para: parse an XML file and build a tree.

detaileddescription.para: It's like xmlParseFile except it bypass all catalog lookups.

simplesect.para: the resulting document tree or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Convert all the SGML catalog entries as XML ones.

simplesect.para: the number of entries converted if successful, -1 otherwise

briefdescription.para: Free up the memory associated to the catalog list.
Add the new entry to the catalog list.

parameterdescription.para: the URL to a new local catalog

simplesect.para: the updated list

briefdescription.para: Do a complete resolution lookup of an External Identifier using a document's private catalog list.

simplesect.para: the URI of the resource or NULL if not found, it must be freed by the caller.

briefdescription.para: Do a complete resolution lookup of an URI using a document's private catalog list.

simplesect.para: the URI of the resource or NULL if not found, it must be freed by the caller.

briefdescription.para: Used to set the debug level for catalog operation, 0 disable debugging, 1 enable it.

parameterdescription.para: the debug level of catalogs required

simplesect.para: the previous value of the catalog debugging level

briefdescription.para: Allows to set the preference between public and system for deletion in XML Catalog resolution.

detaileddescription.para: C.f. section 4.1.1 of the spec Values accepted are XML_CATA_PREFER_PUBLIC or XML_CATA_PREFER_SYSTEM

xrefdescription.para: This setting is global and not thread-safe.

simplesect.para: the previous value of the default preference for delegation

briefdescription.para: Used to set the user preference w.r.t.

detaileddescription.para: to what catalogs should be accepted

briefdescription.para: Used to get the user preference w.r.t.

detaileddescription.para: to what catalogs should be accepted

simplesect.para: the current xmlCatalogAllow value

briefdescription.para: Try to lookup the catalog reference associated to a system ID.

simplesect.para: the resource if found or NULL otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Try to lookup the catalog reference associated to a public ID.

simplesect.para: the resource if found or NULL otherwise.

briefdescription.para: interfaces to the Catalog handling system

detaileddescription.para: the catalog module implements the support for XML Catalogs and SGML catalogs
SGML Open Technical Resolution TR9401:1997. http://www.jclark.com/sp/catalog.htm

simplesect.para: See Copyright for the status of this software.
Daniel Veillard
